title: SmoothPlayerAnimations
body:
# Smooth Player Animations

A lightweight player animation enhancement mod for Minecraft.

Smooth Player Animations improves movement and action animations while staying close to the vanilla experience.

---

## Features

- Smooth walking, running and sprinting animations
- Improved swimming and crawling
- Climbing animations
- Dynamic idle animations
- Layered upper/lower body animation system
- Smooth animation transitions
- Designed for compatibility with other animation mods

---

## Showcase

### Smooth Movement

![smooth movement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f856740d874712d59cfbbef49c402dd9a898d183.gif)

![dynamic idle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf86339943c80d8b3374f2db4e558d4a0030039a.gif)

### hold poppy

![ hold poppy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86967aed5dad4691525afc870346347500cc96aa.gif)

### Combat & Item Usage

![Item Usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7af6d677690029f4114ff243c297c2b392d5ea7.gif)


### Mod Compatibility

![Mod Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ffdd30e83d2ca99462b824ee9b6d7ba2ec7d222.gif)


---

## Compatibility

Built with compatibility in mind.

Works alongside many popular mods, including:

- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- [NotEnoughAnimations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)

---

## Performance

Smooth Player Animations is designed to be lightweight and suitable for:

- Singleplayer
- Multiplayer
- Large Modpacks

---

## Requirements

- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)(choosable)
- [Player Animation Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-animation-library)(Except for 0.1beta)

---
## Note(!!!!!!!)

⚠️ Some features shown in screenshots and GIFs are demonstrated using my resource pack

[Smooth Player Animations works as a standalone mod, but the full experience requires the accompanying resource pack.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hxss_animation_optimization)

You can create your own animation by following the example of my resource package.

## Credits

[Special thanks to them for providing the animation, their animations are MIT licensed, this project license does not affect it.](https://github.com/Kelvin285/KelvinsBetterPlayerAnimations)

Additional thanks to everyone who provides feedback, testing, bug reports, and suggestions during development.

Without their help, this project would not have been possible.

## Planned Features

- Landing animations
- More contextual animations


This video was created by me and my good friend together.
